name: ai-project-kickoff
description: Brand-neutral standard process for AI projects: requirements gathering captured as working markdown in docs/ (the source of truth), with the document package rendered at each review gate (PoC and production) by the project's chosen document style pack (default generic-docx; tecman-docx for Tecman projects; or your own). Gate-aware taxonomy with the LLD at the PoC gate. Provides /new-ai-project and /render-gate-package, the ai-poc-docs skill, discovery (reasoning model) and gate-renderer (Sonnet) agents, and a design-reviewer agent.
